case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. JOSEPH J. BAAKE et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS - AMENDED - FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.
